title: Enterprise Model Selection Board
summary: Rank candidate models across cost, latency, safety, and task performance for enterprise deployment committees.
knowledge_base: User: enterprise architecture teams selecting a production model.
Primary pain: no shared, decision-ready tradeoff view across quality, latency, cost, and safety.
Decision output: ranked shortlist with deployment recommendation.
Business impact: faster model choices and fewer expensive reversals.

app_modules.label: Board 01
app_modules.title: Candidate Score
app_modules.description: Score a candidate model against enterprise deployment constraints.

app_modules.label: Board 02
app_modules.title: Tradeoff Review
app_modules.description: Compare the candidate model against the current enterprise default.

app_modules.label: Board 03
app_modules.title: Selection Brief
app_modules.description: Create the recommendation packet for the model selection committee.
